nasb.text: Death and life are in the power of the tongue, And those who love it will eat its fruit.

esv.text: Death and life are in the power of the tongue, and those who love it will eat its fruits.

cnv.text: 生與死都在舌頭的權下； 愛把弄這權柄的，必自食其果。

ccb.text: 口舌能够定生死， 多嘴多言食恶果。

csbs.text: 生与死都在舌头的权下； 喜爱它的必食其果。
